history.content: No active task-control or schedule data is currently available, so there are no upcoming scheduled items visible from this snapshot. Today’s key completed work was the boot/hot-restart routing fix: automated outputs now always land in a brand-new unread automated chat, frontend notifications surface those sessions even when another chat is active, and the duplicate TasksPage fallback race was removed while keeping backward-compatible payload fields. Things left off in a stable, verified state (build passed) with related task **052ee635-3870-4989-b35a-f1b8046186eb** completed.
